{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Bliss's power
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Bliss]] radiates an eternal [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
